subject: ARALING_PANLIPUNAN
title: Land and Water Connections
objective: Sundan ang karaniwang daloy ng tubig sa drainage system.
introduction: Karaniwang dumadaloy pababa ang tubig, ngunit maaari itong dumaan sa sapa, ilog, lawa, basang-lupa, groundwater, dam, o sumingaw. You will explore examples, sort cards, practice, and answer five questions.

vocabulary.definition: A key word used in the lesson “Land and Water Connections”.
A key word used in the lesson “Land and Water Connections”.
A key word used in the lesson “Land and Water Connections”.

activities.instruction: Pag-aralan ang ideya at pakinggan ang salaysay.
activities.content: Karaniwang dumadaloy pababa ang tubig, ngunit maaari itong dumaan sa sapa, ilog, lawa, basang-lupa, groundwater, dam, o sumingaw.
activities.accessibilityAlternative: Text alternative: Karaniwang dumadaloy pababa ang tubig, ngunit maaari itong dumaan sa sapa, ilog, lawa, basang-lupa, groundwater, dam, o sumingaw.

activities.instruction: Suriin ang bawat learning token at basahin ang mga halimbawa.
activities.accessibilityAlternative: A numbered list of the same examples is available for keyboard and screen-reader use.

activities.instruction: Ilagay ang bawat card sa “angkop” o “hindi angkop.”

feedback.correct: Your groups follow the lesson rule.
feedback.retry: Use the explanation, not color or position.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: Tap an item and then tap a labeled category; dragging is optional.

activities.instruction: Bakit karaniwang dumadaloy pababa ang tubig?

feedback.retry: Read the lesson rule again. dahil sa kulay and dahil sa pangalan ng ilog do not fit.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: All choices are visible text and selectable with TalkBack.

activities.instruction: Itambal ang bawat halimbawa sa ideya ng aralin.

feedback.retry: Return to the explanation and compare one pair at a time.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: A list-based matching control replaces drag gestures.

activities.instruction: Tapusin nang sunod-sunod ang gabay na balik-aral.

feedback.correct: You are ready for the five-question check.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: Up and down buttons provide an alternative to dragging.

items.prompt: Aling pahayag ang pinakaangkop sa “Land and Water Connections”?

options.text: Karaniwang dumadaloy pababa ang tubig, ngunit maaari itong dumaan sa sapa, ilog, lawa, basang-lupa, groundwater, dam, o sumingaw.

items.explanation: The correct response is “Karaniwang dumadaloy pababa ang tubig, ngunit maaari itong dumaan sa sapa, ilog, lawa, basang-lupa, groundwater, dam, o sumingaw.” because it follows the lesson explanation: Karaniwang dumadaloy pababa ang tubig, ngunit maaari itong dumaan sa sapa, ilog, lawa, basang-lupa, groundwater, dam, o sumingaw.

The correct response is “ulan→sapa→ilog” because it follows the lesson explanation: Karaniwang dumadaloy pababa ang tubig, ngunit maaari itong dumaan sa sapa, ilog, lawa, basang-lupa, groundwater, dam, o sumingaw.

items.prompt: Alin ang hindi sumusunod sa ideya ng aralin?
items.explanation: The correct response is “Lahat ng sapa direktang dagat” because it follows the lesson explanation: Karaniwang dumadaloy pababa ang tubig, ngunit maaari itong dumaan sa sapa, ilog, lawa, basang-lupa, groundwater, dam, o sumingaw.

items.prompt: Bakit karaniwang dumadaloy pababa ang tubig?
items.explanation: The correct response is “dahil sa gravity” because it follows the lesson explanation: Karaniwang dumadaloy pababa ang tubig, ngunit maaari itong dumaan sa sapa, ilog, lawa, basang-lupa, groundwater, dam, o sumingaw.

items.prompt: Aling halimbawa ang dapat gamitin sa huling balik-aral?
items.explanation: The correct response is “evaporation returns water vapor” because it follows the lesson explanation: Karaniwang dumadaloy pababa ang tubig, ngunit maaari itong dumaan sa sapa, ilog, lawa, basang-lupa, groundwater, dam, o sumingaw.

assetSpecs.prompt: Friendly Grade 3 cartoon storybook concept board for Land and Water Connections; rounded shapes, warm dark-brown outlines, tropical palette, no embedded text, uncluttered small-screen layout. Compose overlays provide labels and interactive targets.
assetSpecs.contentDescription: Five connected learning tokens for exploring examples in Land and Water Connections.
